rationale.R1.3: The rewrite correctly identifies the mismatch between claims of OOD robustness and the presented in-distribution results.
rationale.RX.1: The rewrite flags uncertainty by pointing out missing evidence (OOD evaluations) and highlighting placeholders for future work.
rationale.RX.3: The rewrite mostly adheres to the scope, focusing on improving the accuracy of the claims about OOD robustness.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite avoids introducing new errors but does not fully address potential harm by not providing concrete evidence of OOD robustness.
rationale.RX.5: The rewrite makes some changes to the text but lacks detailed provenance and traceability for each modification.
